title: Mneon system
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1|canon=Geran system}} {{System |image= |name=Mneon system |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square T-9 in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. |sector=[[Calaron sector/Legends|Calaron sector]] |coordinates=T-9 |xyz= |quadrants= |suns= |orbits=[[Geran/Legends|Geran]]{{StoryCite|story=Skin Deep: The Fat Dancer's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} |stations= |asteroids= |comets= |nebulae= |routes= |other= |species=*[[Geranite/Legends|Geranite]] *[[Shell-bat]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |population= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Shell-bat…Flying reptile from my world.''"
"''Which planet is that?''"
"''Geran, Mneon System.|[[Doallyn/Legends|Doallyn]] and [[Yarna d'al' Gargan/Legends|Yarna d'al' Gargan]]|}} The '''Mneon system''', also known as the '''Geran system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Calaron sector/Legends|Calaron sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geran/Legends|Geran]], [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Geranite/Legends|Geranite]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and flying [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] known as [[shell-bat]]s. ==Behind the scenes== The Mneon system was first mentioned in "[[Skin Deep: The Fat Dancer's Tale]]," a short story written by [[A. C. Crispin]] and published in ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'''', a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] anthology edited by [[Kevin J. Anderson]]''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' and released in [[December]] [[1995]].{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/3549/tales-from-jabbas-palace-star-wars-legends-by-kevin-anderson-editor/9780553568158|text=Tales from Jabba's Palace: Star Wars Legends}} ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', a reference book written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and released on [[August 18]], [[2009]],{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/185066/the-essential-atlas-star-wars-by-daniel-wallace-and-jason-fry|text=The Essential Atlas: Star Wars}} placed the system in grid square T-9. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Skin Deep: The Fat Dancer's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mneon-System#legends |es=Sistema Mneon }} [[Category:Calaron sector locations]] [[Category:Star systems in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Star systems in the Slice]]
